description: On-page LOB record header [+0:+12]; LARGE_ROOT links
source: Python PageStore.from_bak scan of typecoverage_full.bak (lob_links table, LOB_DATA alloc_unit)

field_map.+6:+8: 5269 = 0x6952 = 26962 (blob context ID, same within one LOB object)

known_fields.+2:+4: uint16 LE record length (used by code)

unknown_fields.+6:+8: uint16 = varies per LOB object (blob context/sequence ID?)

notes: The code correctly reads length at +2 and btyp at +12; header bytes 0-1 and 4-11 are not decoded. 0x0008 at +0:+2 is consistent across DATA blobs. The value at +6:+8 appears to be a per-LOB-object context identifier (same across all fragments of one blob).
